records.question: Which Tesco suppliers have the phone number 287-071-1153x254, with addresses that became effective on or after 2008-11-22 12:01:25 and remained valid at least until 2018-03-02 19:50:22, and who supplied products starting at most 2017-07-13 15:02:24 and ending exactly 2018-03-24 23:01:03, where the total amounts purchased were exactly 31862.59 and the total value purchased was at least 76992.42?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN supplier_addresses ON suppliers.supplier_id = supplier_addresses.supplier_id
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
WHERE supplier_addresses.date_from >= '2008-11-22 12:01:25' AND supplier_addresses.date_to >= '2018-03-02 19:50:22' AND suppliers.supplier_phone = '287-071-1153x254' AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03' AND product_suppliers.total_amount_purchased = '31862.59' AND suppliers.supplier_name = 'Tesco' AND product_suppliers.total_value_purchased >= 76992.42 AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_from <= '2017-07-13 15:02:24'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.supplier_id FROM Suppliers AS T1 INNER JOIN Supplier_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.supplier_id = T2.supplier_id INNER JOIN Product_Suppliers AS T3 ON T1.supplier_id = T3.supplier_id WHERE T1.supplier_name = 'Tesco' AND T1.supplier_phone = '287-071-1153x254' AND T2.date_from >= '2008-11-22 12:01:25' AND (T2.date_to IS NULL OR T2.date_to >= '2018-03-02 19:50:22') AND T3.date_supplied_from <= '2017-07-13 15:02:24' AND T3.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03' AND T3.total_amount_purchased = '31862.59' AND T3.total_value_purchased >= 76992.42

records.question: Which Tesco suppliers with phone number 287-071-1153x254 supplied products that were purchased for exactly 31862.59 in total amount, where the total value purchased was at most 76992.42, and they supplied on 2018-03-24 23:01:03 with a start date on or before 2017-07-13 15:02:24?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
WHERE suppliers.supplier_phone = '287-071-1153x254' AND suppliers.supplier_name = 'Tesco' AND product_suppliers.total_amount_purchased = '31862.59' AND product_suppliers.total_value_purchased <= 76992.42 AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03' AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_from <= '2017-07-13 15:02:24'

records.question: Which suppliers have the name AB Store?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
WHERE suppliers.supplier_name = 'AB Store'
records.pred_sql: SELECT supplier_id FROM Suppliers WHERE supplier_name = 'AB Store'

records.question: Which suppliers provided Hardware mice priced at least 803.74, with a total purchase amount exactly 31862.59, supplied from exactly 2017-07-13 15:02:24 to exactly 2018-03-24 23:01:03?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
JOIN products ON product_suppliers.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE product_suppliers.date_supplied_from = '2017-07-13 15:02:24' AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03' AND product_suppliers.total_amount_purchased = '31862.59' AND products.product_type_code = 'Hardware' AND products.product_name = 'mouse' AND products.product_price >= 803.74
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.supplier_id FROM Suppliers AS T1 INNER JOIN Product_Suppliers AS T2 ON T1.supplier_id = T2.supplier_id INNER JOIN Products AS T3 ON T2.product_id = T3.product_id WHERE T3.product_name = 'Hardware mice' AND T3.product_price >= 803.74 AND T2.total_value_purchased = 31862.59 AND T2.date_supplied_from = '2017-07-13 15:02:24' AND T2.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03'

JOIN products ON product_suppliers.product_id = products.product_id

records.question: Which suppliers have purchased products valued at least 7273.74 and have addresses on file?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN supplier_addresses ON suppliers.supplier_id = supplier_addresses.supplier_id
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
WHERE product_suppliers.total_value_purchased >= 7273.74

records.question: Which suppliers named AB Store have the phone number 1-483-283-4742, purchased exactly 85922.86 in products, and whose address was valid on or before 2015-03-16 19:30:29 until exactly 2018-03-24 00:14:45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN supplier_addresses ON suppliers.supplier_id = supplier_addresses.supplier_id
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
WHERE suppliers.supplier_name = 'AB Store' AND supplier_addresses.date_from <= '2015-03-16 19:30:29' AND product_suppliers.total_amount_purchased = '85922.86' AND supplier_addresses.date_to = '2018-03-24 00:14:45' AND suppliers.supplier_phone = '1-483-283-4742'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.supplier_id FROM Suppliers AS T1 INNER JOIN Product_Suppliers AS T2 ON T1.supplier_id = T2.supplier_id INNER JOIN Supplier_Addresses AS T3 ON T1.supplier_id = T3.supplier_id WHERE T1.supplier_name = 'AB Store' AND T1.supplier_phone = '1-483-283-4742' AND T3.date_from <= '2015-03-16 19:30:29' AND T3.date_to = '2018-03-24 00:14:45' GROUP BY T1.supplier_id HAVING SUM(T2.total_value_purchased) = 85922.86
